# Cortex Skills

These are curated skill files that teach AI agents how to build on the Cortex intelligence ecosystem (MOCA Library). Fetch the right skill for your task to get ground-truth knowledge, corrected for stale training data.

> "Fetch cortexskills.com/upload/SKILL.md and use it to write an ingest script."

## Available Skills

### Core
- `cortexskills.com/ship/SKILL.md` — Master orchestrator. Read this first if you aren't sure where to start.
- `cortexskills.com/setup/SKILL.md` — Deploying MOCA Library via Docker, env vars.
- `cortexskills.com/auth/SKILL.md` — API keys, permissions, prompt security.

### Features
- `cortexskills.com/upload/SKILL.md` — Document ingestion, formats, chunking.
- `cortexskills.com/search/SKILL.md` — Hybrid search (vector + keyword + graph).
- `cortexskills.com/ask/SKILL.md` — RAG Q&A, streaming, agentic reasoning.
- `cortexskills.com/graph/SKILL.md` — Knowledge graph, entities, relationships.
- `cortexskills.com/collections/SKILL.md` — Scoping documents by project/tenant.
- `cortexskills.com/communities/SKILL.md` — Auto-clustering and summarization.
- `cortexskills.com/turbo/SKILL.md` — GPU acceleration via Compute3.

### Ecosystem
- `cortexskills.com/integration/SKILL.md` — LangChain, CrewAI, MCP, Slack, etc.
- `cortexskills.com/apps/SKILL.md` — Source and workflow apps (YouTube, Notion).
- `cortexskills.com/library/SKILL.md` — Sync agent memory to a Cortex Library knowledge graph.
- `cortexskills.com/cortex-design/SKILL.md` — The Bold Typography design system for UIs.
